gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance; consulting firms also stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, after which students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, while students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; additionally, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; furthermore, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
